name: Cat Fancies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar and shortening. Beat until well blended.
2. Add milk and vanilla; beat until creamy.
3. Add egg and mix thoroughly.
4. Gradually add flour mixture until just combined.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and pecans.
6. Refrigerate at least 1 hour before baking.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Form dough into 1-inch balls and place on ungreased baking sheets, about 3 inches apart.
9. Flatten each cookie with the palm of your hand.
10. Press pecan halves into the top of each cookie for ears.
11. Press pretzel stick halves into each side for whiskers.
12. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes (chewy) or 11 to 13 minutes (crisp). Do not overbake.
13. Remove from oven and let cool on baking sheets for a few minutes.
14. Transfer cookies to foil to cool completely.
Makes: About 3 dozen cookies
